primary_variables.matched_definition: Mechanical stimulation from cyclic stretch, compression, or substrate deformation.
evidence: we examine the time-dependent response of primary human mesenchymal stem cells (hMSCs) to cyclic tensile strain (CTS).
Cells were strained for 1 or 2 h at, low-intensity (0–4% strain at 1 Hz), intermediate-intensity (0–4% strain at 2 Hz), or high-intensity (2.6–6.2% strain at 5 Hz).

primary_variables.matched_definition: Genetic perturbation that reduces or eliminates gene function.
evidence: We quantified the effects of siRNA-mediated knockdown (KD) of SUN2 on primary hMSCs by MS
The siRNAs depleted SUN2 to 35% of scrambled controls

primary_variables.matched_definition: Genetic perturbation that modifies sequence or increases expression/activity.
evidence: The proteomes of Y201 cells were quantified with doxycycline-induced OE of SUN2 to 160% and 410% of control levels.

attributes.dose_or_concentration: low-intensity (0–4% strain at 1 Hz), intermediate-intensity (0–4% strain at 2 Hz), or high-intensity (2.6–6.2% strain at 5 Hz)
evidence: Cells were strained for 1 or 2 h at, low-intensity (0–4% strain at 1 Hz), intermediate-intensity (0–4% strain at 2 Hz), or high-intensity (2.6–6.2% strain at 5 Hz).

attributes.duration: 24 h of culture [followed by] a further three days
evidence: hMSCs were incubated in complete medium containing RNAi Max Lipofectamine... in the presence of short interfering double stranded RNA (siRNA... final concentration of 10 nM)
Following 24 h of culture, the siRNA and Lipofectamine were removed. Cells were cultured for a further three days
Cells containing the inducible SUN2 expression vector were cultured for 4 days in complete medium containing 50 ngmL-1 doxycycline (DOX, Sigma).

control_arms: Non-transformed cells treated with 50 ngmL-1 DOX
replicate_hints: linear regression model that considers donor variability at both the peptide and protein levels

evidence: analysis of the intracellular proteome by MS, showed greater changes relative to unstrained controls
For comparison, we also examined proteomic changes in response to low-intensity CTS (1 h at 1 Hz, change in strain = 4.0%).
We quantified the effects of siRNA-mediated knockdown (KD) of SUN2 on primary hMSCs by MS, comparing two siRNAs to increase confidence of identifying on-target effects
The proteomes of Y201 cells were quantified with doxycycline-induced OE of SUN2 to 160% and 410% of control levels.

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Data-dependent acquisition (DDA) was explicitly used on an Orbitrap Elite and Q Exactive HF, and quantification was performed using label-free ion intensities (Progenesis QI) with median normalization.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The study quantifies phosphosite occupancy and reports specific differentially regulated phosphosites, although it notes that samples were not enriched by affinity columns prior to MS.
